description_long: This is a round wooden table covered with a white tablecloth, accompanied by four wooden chairs with dark cushioned seats. The table and chairs are set on a square section of dark wood flooring, suggesting a defined dining or gathering area. The tablecloth drapes evenly over the edges, concealing the tabletop and part of the legs. The chairs have vertical slatted backs and are arranged symmetrically around the table. The wood has a polished finish, giving the set a refined and classic appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for communal dining or meetings in an urban environment.
description: A round wooden table with a white tablecloth, surrounded by four wooden chairs with dark cushioned seats on a square wood floor section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table with a white cloth and four wooden chairs, with the nearest chair fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetry of the chair arrangement and the draped tablecloth, with the nearest chair centered.
description_view_2: Rear view with the farthest chair directly facing the viewer, showing the backrest design and tablecloth drape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, but with a different chair in the foreground and the tablecloth's edge more visible.
